'''chapawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hicky|hicky]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hicky|hicky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chapawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæpæwæth|chæpæwæth]] || [[word:chæpæwæj|chæpæwæj]] || [[word:chæpæwæsh|chæpæwæsh]] || [[word:chæpæwæ|chæpæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapapawath|chapapawath]] || [[word:chapapawaj|chapapawaj]] || [[word:chapapawash|chapapawash]] || [[word:chapapawa|chapapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapawath|chapawath]] || [[word:chapawaj|chapawaj]] || [[word:chapawash|chapawash]] || [[word:chapawa|chapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapafwath|chapafwath]] || [[word:chapafwaj|chapafwaj]] || [[word:chapafwash|chapafwash]] || [[word:chapafwaf|chapafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chapawatha|chapawatha]] || [[word:chapawaja|chapawaja]] || [[word:chapawasha|chapawasha]] || [[word:chapawaka|chapawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chapawath|chapawath]] || [[word:chapawaj|chapawaj]] || [[word:chapawash|chapawash]] || [[word:chapawa|chapawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chapawathal|chapawathal]] || [[word:chapawajal|chapawajal]] || [[word:chapawashal|chapawashal]] || [[word:chapawakal|chapawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chapawathatha|chapawathatha]] || [[word:chapawajaja|chapawajaja]] || [[word:chapawashasha|chapawashasha]] || [[word:chapawaka|chapawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chapawathan|chapawathan]] || [[word:chapawajan|chapawajan]] || [[word:chapawashan|chapawashan]] || [[word:chapawakan|chapawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chapawathaoro|chapawathaoro]] || [[word:chapawajaoro|chapawajaoro]] || [[word:chapawashaoro|chapawashaoro]] || [[word:chapawakaoro|chapawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
